ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source location of the route */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "transportation_type" TEXT /* Type of transportation (e.g., truck, air, sea) */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed for the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_transportation_type FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_type") REFERENCES transportation_types ("transportation_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES locations ("location_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code for the location (e.g., airport code, port code) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_types" (
  "transportation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation type */,
  "transportation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation type */,
  "max_weight_capacity" REAL /* Maximum weight capacity of the transportation type */,
  "max_volume_capacity" REAL /* Maximum volume capacity of the transportation type */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the transportation type */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the shipment is assigned to */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo being shipped (e.g., organic, non-organic) */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., en route, delivered) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the shipment */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time for the shipment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the shipment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipment_status FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_status") REFERENCES shipment_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_cargo_type FOREIGN KEY ("cargo_type") REFERENCES cargo_types ("cargo_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_types" (
  "cargo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo type */,
  "cargo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cargo type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo type */,
  "temperature_requirements" TEXT /* Temperature requirements for the cargo type */,
  "handling_instructions" TEXT /* Special handling instructions for the cargo type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "expected_duration" REAL /* Expected duration for the status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "rating" REAL /* Driver's rating based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  "manufacture_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being updated */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the shipment */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks or notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_updates_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES shipment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_updates_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics coordinator, driver, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the shipment */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)
